nodes.label: Husky head line-art with blue eyes (background removed)
nodes.description: A minimal, light/white line-art illustration of a husky's head facing forward, with piercing blue eyes as the dominant color accent. Background has been removed (transparent), as indicated by the '-removebg-preview' filename suffix. Likely a Photoshop layer export ('Layer_2') used as a brand asset variant.

nodes.label: Husky brand mark
nodes.description: The husky-themed brand mark/logo concept used across the Dash project (referenced in recent commits like 'Tighten gap between husky mark and wordmark' and 'Bump sidebar husky mark from 48 to 56px').
